holdings.infoBox: GMF is an equity ETF with a total of 1294 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.92%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.13%, Tencent Holdings at 3.46%, Alibaba Group Holding at 2.56%, and MediaTek at 2.48%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Emerging Asia Pacific ETF (GMF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Emerging Asia Pacific BMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of emerging markets firms. GMF was launched on Mar 19, 2007 and is issued by State Street.
